title: Roasted Egyptian Lamb Kebabs
description: A roasted and juicy Egyptian dish featuring lamb, ketchup, and beurre-monte, perfect for a kosher-friendly dinner option.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together ketchup, beurre-monte, olive oil, garlic, ginger, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the marinade.
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast the lamb kebabs in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until cooked to an internal temperature of 145 degrees Fahrenheit.
Let the kebabs rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the roasted Egyptian lamb kebabs hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro.
Refrigerate or freeze any leftovers for later use.
